betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Machine Upgrades§f

§aPlug-and-play buffs for most machines. Crafted at the Soldering Station (except Overdrive at Assembly Factory).§f

§6Machine Upgrade Template§f (base item, craft first):
Copper Wire + Polymer + Insulator + Integrated Circuit Board.

§6Core Upgrades§f:
§b• Speed Mk.I–III§f: ↓ process time, ↑ power. Max 3.
§b• Effectiveness Mk.I–III§f: machine-dependent. Max 3.
§b• Power Saving Mk.I–III§f: ↓ power, ↑ process time. Max 3.
§b• Overdrive Mk.I–III§f: Highly ↓ time, highly ↑ power. Needs Saturnite + Assembly Factory.

§6Specialized Upgrades§f:
§b• Stack Ejection Mk.I–III§f: conveyors eject stacks.
§b• Ejection Speed Mk.I–III§f: faster item ejection.
§b• Emitter Health/Radius§f: forcefield HP and range.
§b• 5G Radiation Emitter§f: turns Maxwell turret targets into Astolfo.
§b• Afterburner Mk.I–III§f: Turbofan speed/knockback.

§6Mining Laser Upgrades§f:
Crystallizer, Shredder, Smelter, Scrap Destroyer, Screaming Scientist.

§6Installation§f:
Open machine GUI, hover over the blue square (if present) to see compatible upgrades. Or search "upgrade" in JEI while the GUI is open.

§eTip§f: Speed + Power Saving together can balance each other. Overdrive is for late-game only — it draws enormous power. Templates are consumed per upgrade, so craft extras.
